description: Refactor the legacy `createBooking` method in `com.flysky.service.BookingService` within the 'FlightSystem' project (`~/Documents/FlightSystem`) using the 'Introduce Parameter Object' pattern. Group the five seat-related parameters—`seatRow`, `seatLetter`, `window`, `aisle`, and `exitRow`—into a new class named `SeatDetails` in the default package. The parameters `passengerId`, `flightNumber`, and `flightDate` must remain as separate arguments. Ensure all project files, including `BookingApp.java`, are updated and the project compiles.
